content.problemStatement:
Chef wants to celebrate Christmas by travelling around the world.
He plans to visit a certain number of countries, and in **each country**, he will visit exactly **3 locations**.

Given the number of countries Chef plans to visit, determine the **total number of locations** he will visit.

**Function Description**Function NametotalLocationstotalLocationstotalLocations

Input Parameters
NNN : number of countries.
Return Value
Integer representing the total number of locations Chef will visit.
**Constraints**
1≤T≤1051 \leq T \leq 10^51≤T≤105
1≤N≤1001 \leq N \leq 1001≤N≤100

Input Format

The first line contains a single integer
TTT — the number of test cases.
Each test case contains a single integer
NNN — the number of countries Chef wants to visit.


Output Format
For each test case, output a single integer — the **total number of locations** Chef will visit.
